'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 50''' was the fiftieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[December 11]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The Creation of a [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]]
*[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Forces]]
*[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunters]] - [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]]
*[[Talon Karrde]]
*[[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]]
*[[Endor/Legends|Endor]] - [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]
*[[Ssi-ruuvi security droid|Ssi-Ruuvi Security Droid]]
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Khetanna/Legends|Sail Barge]]
